app.title: OmniVoice Triton — Kernel Fusion & CUDA Graph Optimization
benchmarks.no_e2e: No E2E benchmark data found. Run `make bench-speed` to generate.
benchmarks.no_kernels: No kernel benchmark data found. Run `make bench-kernels` to generate.
inference.instruct_placeholder: Describe the voice: e.g. 'A warm, friendly female voice with a slight accent'
inference.prompt: Configure settings above and press **Generate Audio**.
inference.text_placeholder: Enter text to convert to speech...
inference.title: Live Inference
inference.unavailable: {name} runner not available — check that omnivoice-triton is installed
inference.upload_ref_audio: Please upload a reference audio file for voice cloning.
overview.architecture_desc: OmniVoice uses a NAR (Non-AutoRegressive) architecture with iterative unmasking for token generation, built on a Qwen3-0.6B transformer backbone.
overview.description: OmniVoice Triton accelerates OmniVoice TTS inference through Triton kernel fusion and CUDA Graph optimization, achieving up to **2.8x** end-to-end speedup.
overview.gen_mode_clone: **Voice Clone** — Clone a voice from a reference audio file.
overview.gen_mode_design: **Voice Design** — Design voice characteristics via text instructions.
overview.kernel_fusedaddrmsnorm: Fused residual add + RMS norm. Eliminates intermediate buffers.
overview.kernel_rmsnorm: Fused RMS normalization layer. Reduces memory bandwidth usage.
overview.kernel_swiglu: Fused SwiGLU activation gate for FFN blocks.
overview.no_e2e: No E2E benchmark data. Run `make bench-speed` to generate.
overview.no_gpu: No GPU detected. Inference requires a CUDA-capable GPU.
overview.no_verification: No verification report found. Run `make test` and `make test-parity` to generate.
overview.runner_faster: CUDA Graph capture and replay. ~2.3x speedup.
overview.runner_hybrid: Triton kernels + CUDA Graph combined. ~2.8x speedup.
overview.runner_triton: Triton kernel fusion: RMSNorm, SwiGLU, FusedAddRMSNorm. ~1.3x speedup.
overview.title: Project Overview
samples.no_data: No audio samples found. Generate samples and place them in assets/audio_samples/.
samples.no_matches: No samples match the selected filters.
sidebar.subtitle: Triton kernel fusion + CUDA Graph acceleration
sidebar.title: OmniVoice Triton
verification.no_report: No verification report found. Run `make test` to generate Tier 1, `make test-parity` for Tier 2.
verification.tier3_deps_note: Tier 3 requires extra dependencies (jiwer, librosa, soundfile). Install with: `uv sync --extra eval`, then run `make eval-quality`.
